name: kafka-producer
description: Publishes records to Apache Kafka topics. Supports SASL/SSL authentication, idempotent delivery, and multiple serialization formats.
author: hermes-core

bootstrap_servers.title: Bootstrap Servers
bootstrap_servers.description: Comma-separated list of Kafka broker addresses (e.g. broker1:9092,broker2:9092)

delivery_timeout_ms.title: Delivery Timeout (ms)
delivery_timeout_ms.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for message delivery acknowledgment

request_timeout_ms.title: Request Timeout (ms)
request_timeout_ms.description: Timeout for individual broker requests in milliseconds

retry_count.title: Retry Count
retry_count.description: Number of times to retry a failed produce request

retry_backoff_ms.title: Retry Backoff (ms)
retry_backoff_ms.description: Backoff duration in milliseconds between retries

batch_size.title: Batch Size (bytes)
batch_size.description: Maximum size in bytes of a produce batch sent to the broker

linger_ms.title: Linger Time (ms)
linger_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds to allow batching of messages before sending

topic.title: Target Topic
topic.description: Kafka topic name to publish messages to

key_field.title: Key Field
key_field.description: Field from the record to use as the Kafka message key (leave empty for null key)

compression.title: Compression Type
compression.description: Compression algorithm applied to produce batches

acks.title: Acknowledgment Mode
acks.description: Number of broker acknowledgments required before a produce is considered successful

enable_idempotence.title: Enable Idempotence
enable_idempotence.description: Guarantee exactly-once delivery per partition using idempotent producer

partition_strategy.title: Partition Strategy
partition_strategy.description: Algorithm used to select the target partition for each message

headers_mapping.title: Headers Mapping
headers_mapping.description: Static or templated Kafka headers to attach to every message (key: header name, value: field path or literal)
